profile.name: AKVA group ASA
profile.about: AKVA group ASA is a Norway-based leading technology and service partner to the global aquaculture industry, incorporated in 1982 and headquartered in Klepp Stasjon, Rogaland. The company designs, manufactures, and installs a full range of aquaculture equipment and software, serving fish farmers across Norway, Chile, Canada, Scotland, Australia, Iceland, Denmark, Spain, Greece, Turkey, and Poland. It operates through three segments: Sea Based Technology (SBT — cages, feed barges, nets, feed systems, sensors), Land Based Technology (LBT — recirculating aquaculture systems/RAS), and Digital (FishtalkTM, AKVA connect software). AKVA group is a subsidiary of Egersund Group AS. CEO is Knut Nesse (permanent since May 2023). The company has approximately 1,469 employees.

people.name: Knut Nesse
people.title: Chief Executive Officer
people.bio: Permanent CEO since May 2023, having served as acting CEO since November 2022.
